candidate_llm_application: LLM constitutional-AI training via preserved dissent: train on adversarial pairs of opposing principles, both retained in the model; final answer emerges from latent dialectic.

results.title: Constitutional Ai: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on constitutional AI, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (constitutional AI); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (jurisprudence-specific terms vs LLM terms).
